description: Procedural bone rotation offsets for the UE5 Mannequin. Each command sets the additive rotation (Pitch, Yaw, Roll) on a named bone in real time. Used by Embody Animation Offset Studio to drive poses, animations, and AI-generated motion.

POST.description: Sets a procedural rotation offset on the named bone. All three rotation axes are sent together. Values are floating-point degrees.

params.bone: string - UE5 Mannequin bone name (see Supported Bones below)
params.pitch: number - rotation around X axis, degrees (-180 to 180)
params.yaw: number - rotation around Y axis, degrees (-180 to 180)
params.roll: number - rotation around Z axis, degrees (-180 to 180)

POST.notes: Values are additive offsets layered on top of the character's current animation. Multi-part bone names (e.g. lowerarm_l) are supported — the parser joins all parts before the last three tokens as the bone name.

POST.description: Resets all bone rotation offsets to zero simultaneously.
POST.notes: Clears every bone offset in a single command. Used when switching poses or stopping playback.
